_run_info.note: _run_info 不属于报告内容主体；做可复现性比对时请忽略本区块。

_meta.compliance_note: Ground truth is synthetic and separate from the interview text so later extraction and classification components cannot read labels from the input notes.

requirements.expected_need: Run the standard purchase requisition to purchase order to goods receipt to invoice verification flow.
requirements.reason: The requested P2P backbone follows a common standard procurement flow without special behavior.

requirements.expected_need: Set approval thresholds for purchase orders at 10k EUR and 100k EUR with different approvers.
requirements.reason: Approval levels and release strategy thresholds are standard concepts, but the values and approver groups are company-specific configuration.

requirements.expected_need: Require a justification field before releasing safety-critical spare-part rush orders.
requirements.reason: The base PO release process exists, but the additional mandatory carve-out-specific field and validation is an extension to standard behavior.

requirements.expected_need: Send emergency repair orders nightly to the fictional OrivaBuy legacy tool during the transition period.
requirements.reason: A custom outbound integration to a fictional carve-out legacy tool is not standard process configuration.

requirements.expected_need: Create supplier master records with name, address, tax number, bank details, and purchasing data.
requirements.reason: Supplier master maintenance with core identification, address, bank, tax, and purchasing attributes is a standard master data capability.

requirements.expected_need: Warn buyers when high-risk regulated-component suppliers lack a current quality certificate.
requirements.reason: Supplier and PO processing exist, but the risk-band/certificate warning adds a specific business validation.

requirements.expected_need: Normalize country values into ISO-style country codes during migration and governance.
requirements.reason: Country code standardization uses standard field semantics and value mapping, with project-specific conversion rules.

requirements.expected_need: Automatically load supplier risk scores from the fictional Nivora Risk Hub spreadsheet.
requirements.reason: A custom load from a carve-out-only external spreadsheet repository is outside standard process support.

requirements.expected_need: Run sales order entry, availability check, delivery, goods issue, billing, and receivables posting.
requirements.reason: The requested O2C backbone matches a standard sales fulfillment and billing flow.

requirements.expected_need: Configure NewCo sales organizations, distribution channels, pricing records, and customer account groups.
requirements.reason: Sales org structures, pricing records, and account groups are standard capabilities configured to the NewCo design.

requirements.expected_need: Require an export-control review reference before delivery release for distributor export orders.
requirements.reason: Order and delivery processing are standard, but the specific distributor/country validation adds custom control logic.

requirements.expected_need: Convert orders from the fictional Virello customer portal into NewCo sales orders without manual re-keying.
requirements.reason: A custom inbound integration from a fictional legacy portal requires development beyond standard configuration.

requirements.expected_need: Set separate NewCo credit-limit thresholds for domestic distributors, export distributors, and intercompany customers.
requirements.reason: Credit management is standard, while thresholds and customer segment rules are project-specific configuration.

requirements.expected_need: Use standard customer returns with return order, inbound receipt, inspection, and credit memo where appropriate.
requirements.reason: The described return and credit memo flow is a standard returns process pattern.

requirements.expected_need: Force a packaging batch reference when the return reason is carve-out packaging defect.
requirements.reason: Returns are standard, but the conditional field requirement for a special return reason is custom validation.

requirements.expected_need: Run general ledger, journal posting, period close, open item clearing, and financial statements for NewCo legal entities.
requirements.reason: These are standard record-to-report capabilities and do not imply a custom extension.

requirements.expected_need: Define NewCo-specific chart of accounts, company codes, and posting periods.
requirements.reason: The finance structures are standard but must be configured to the separated legal entity model.

requirements.expected_need: Require a separation reason code for manual journals related to transition service costs.
requirements.reason: Manual journal posting is standard, but the extra posting validation for transition service costs is an enhancement.

requirements.expected_need: Send a nightly custom file to the fictional Auralis Separation Ledger for Day-1 balance reconciliation.
requirements.reason: A bespoke outbound file to a fictional carve-out ledger is a custom integration and should feed the later development backlog.

requirements.expected_need: Create product master data with material type, base unit, product group, plant views, and valuation data before open order migration.
requirements.reason: Core product/material master maintenance across basic, plant, and valuation views is standard master data scope.

requirements.expected_need: Separate NewCo number ranges for new master data records.
requirements.reason: Number ranges are a standard configuration object adapted to the NewCo operating model.

requirements.expected_need: Prevent shipment of hazardous components until the internal carve-out handling class has been reviewed.
requirements.reason: Product and sales processing are standard, but this handling-class gate is a custom cross-process validation.

requirements.expected_need: Upload product drawings from the fictional SeltraBridge archive and link them to product records.
requirements.reason: A one-off integration with a fictional archive and document-linking load is custom development.
